'''Kampl''' was a security guard at the large bar and [[Casino/Legends|casino]], the [[LoBue Cantina]] located in the [[Abregado-rae Spaceport]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]] during the [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] bid for galactic conquest in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. Along with [[Cyru]], another security guard, they maintained the peace in the casino known for its deceptively small frontage which hid its surprisingly large inside.

{{Char-stub}}
